problem.title: Your customers are asking AI,
problem.desc: Google searches have dropped 40% among users who use AI tools like ChatGPT or Perplexity to find products and services. They get an answer — and your brand may not even be in it.
problem.pain1: Your brand is invisible in AI answers
problem.pain2: Competitors are building AI presence ahead of you
problem.pain3: You have no data, no measurement, no strategy

motors.title: Track All AI Engines
motors.desc: While other tools cover at most 5-6 engines, Tracora monitors 10+ AI engines including Claude, Grok, DeepSeek, Meta AI. More engines means more complete data.

features.title: Everything Your Competitors Have
features.desc: While market leaders focus only on GEO monitoring, Tracora pushes brand strategy further.

featureList.title: 10+ AI Engine Monitoring
featureList.desc: Monitor how your brand appears on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Grok, DeepSeek, Meta AI and more — all in one dashboard.

featureList.title: Slack & Teams Notifications
featureList.desc: Get instant alerts in your Slack or Teams channel when your visibility changes or a competitor pulls ahead.

featureList.title: HubSpot & Salesforce
featureList.desc: Your AI visibility data flows directly into your CRM. Your sales team sees it too — no need to open a separate tool.

featureList.title: Competitor Comparison
featureList.desc: Track your competitors' scores across every AI engine. See who's gaining ground and where you're falling behind — in real time.

featureList.title: Sentiment Analysis
featureList.desc: How do AI engines describe your brand? Positive or negative? Identify which topics are being mentioned unfavorably.

featureList.title: Content Optimization
featureList.desc: We show you what content to write to become more visible in AI, and how much citation your existing content receives.

featureList.title: AI → Sales Attribution
featureList.desc: With GA4 integration, concretely measure the impact of AI engine traffic on sales. Prove your ROI.

featureList.title: White-label Reports
featureList.desc: For agencies: create presentation-quality reports for your clients under your own brand. Tracora works behind the scenes.

featureList.title: Real-time API
featureList.desc: Integrate Tracora data into your own systems. Connect to 5,000+ apps via Zapier, Make, and REST API.

items.q: How is Tracora different from other tools?
items.a: We offer 3 critical features not found in other tools: Slack/Teams real-time notifications, HubSpot + Salesforce CRM integration, and 10+ AI engines (including Claude, Grok, DeepSeek, Meta AI). No alternative offers all three.
Daily automatic scanning on Starter and Pro plans. Hourly scanning on Agency and Enterprise plans. Instant changes are delivered via Slack/Teams notifications.

items.q: Are real queries sent to AI engines?
items.a: Yes. Tracora sends real queries to each AI engine using your specified keywords and analyzes the responses. Not simulated data — real-time measurement.

items.q: How does white-label work for agencies?
items.a: On the Agency plan, you can add your own logo, color palette, and domain to reports. Your clients will have no idea Tracora is behind it.

finalCta.title: Be Visible in the AI Age.
finalCta.desc: Your competitor is gaining ground in AI right now. You can't grow what you don't measure.
finalCta.noCard: Start free. 40% lifetime discount for first 100 users.
